'''jangate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:weakheartedly|weakheartedly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ng-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:weakheartedly|weakheartedly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jangate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:jangate|jangate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jangatesher|jangatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jangatesherĂ«m|jangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jangatero|jangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jangateshĂ«|jangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jangateshĂ«m|jangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijangatero|gokijangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijangateshĂ«|gokijangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijangateshĂ«m|gokijangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojangankerom|gojangankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojangankeshĂ«|gojangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojangankeshĂ«m|gojangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojangankeya|gojangankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jangaterom|jangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jangatemu|jangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jangateya|jangateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijangaterom|gokijangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijangatemu|gokijangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijangateya|gokijangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:jangangate|jangangate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jangangatesher|jangangatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jangangatesherĂ«m|jangangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jangangatero|jangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jangangateshĂ«|jangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jangangateshĂ«m|jangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijangangatero|gokijangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijangangateshĂ«|gokijangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijangangateshĂ«m|gokijangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojangangankerom|gojangangankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojangangankeshĂ«|gojangangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojangangankeshĂ«m|gojangangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojangangankeya|gojangangankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jangangaterom|jangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jangangatemu|jangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jangangateya|jangangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijangangaterom|gokijangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijangangatemu|gokijangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijangangateya|gokijangangateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:jĂŠngĂŠte|jĂŠngĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jĂŠngĂŠtesher|jĂŠngĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m|jĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠngĂŠtero|jĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|jĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|jĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠngĂŠtero|gokijĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|gokijĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|gokijĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojĂŠngĂŠnkerom|gojĂŠngĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«|gojĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gojĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojĂŠngĂŠnkeya|gojĂŠngĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠngĂŠterom|jĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠngĂŠtemu|jĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jĂŠngĂŠteya|jĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠngĂŠterom|gokijĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠngĂŠtemu|gokijĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijĂŠngĂŠteya|gokijĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:jafngafte|jafngafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jafngaftesher|jafngaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafngaftesherĂ«m|jafngaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafngaftero|jafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafngafteshĂ«|jafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafngafteshĂ«m|jafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafngaftero|gokijafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafngafteshĂ«|gokijafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafngafteshĂ«m|gokijafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojafngafnkerom|gojafngafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafngafnkeshĂ«|gojafngafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafngafnkeshĂ«m|gojafngafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojafngafnkeya|gojafngafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafngafterom|jafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafngaftemu|jafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jafngafteya|jafngafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafngafterom|gokijafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafngaftemu|gokijafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijafngafteya|gokijafngafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
